description: Analyze the NHANES dataset using the Epi Info 7 Visual Dashboard. Using the 'NhanesExam.prj' project (Form: BPStudy), recode the 'RIDAGEYR' variable into a new variable 'AgeGroup' with three categories: 'Young Adult' (0-39), 'Middle Aged' (40-59), and 'Older Adult' (60-120). Produce a Means table for Systolic Blood Pressure ('BPXSY1') stratified by Gender ('RIAGENDR') and 'AgeGroup'. Export the resulting table to /home/ga/Documents/BP_Analysis_Results.xlsx and save the dashboard canvas to /home/ga/Documents/BP_Project.canvas7.
